biography: Lorraine Bracco (born October 2, 1954) is an American actress. She is known for her roles as Karen Hill in Goodfellas, Dr. Jennifer Melfi on the HBO television series The Sopranos, and Angela Rizzoli, Jane's mother on Rizzoli & Isles.
name: Lorraine Bracco
place_of_birth: Bay Ridge, Brooklyn, New York City, New York, USA
